typicalWeeklyKm.description: Typical weekly running distance in kilometers over the past four weeks.

longestRecentRunKm.description: Longest single run completed in the past four weeks, in kilometers.

recentRaceDistanceKm.description: Optional recent race distance in kilometers. Null if the runner has no recent race result.

recentRaceTimeIso.description: Optional recent race time as ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT0H45M30S). Null if the runner has no recent race result.

description.description: Self-reported fitness summary in the runner's own words.

hasActiveInjury.description: Whether the runner currently has an active injury or pain that limits training.

activeInjuryDescription.description: Description of the active injury or limitation. Empty string when there is no active injury.

pastInjurySummary.description: Summary of past injuries or recurring issues that should inform the training plan. Empty string if none.

totalWeeks.description: Total number of weeks in the training plan.

goalDescription.description: The name of the goal race or training objective, such as 'Half Marathon' or 'General Fitness'.

phases.description: The periodized training phases that make up this plan.

rationale.description: Overall coaching rationale explaining why this plan is structured this way.

warnings.description: Important warnings or prerequisites the athlete should be aware of before starting.

notes.description: Brief coaching note for this day, such as emphasis or purpose.

weekNumber.description: The week number within the current training phase (1-based).

weeklyTargetKm.description: Target total weekly running distance in kilometers.

isDeloadWeek.description: Whether this is a deload week with reduced volume for recovery.

weekSummary.description: Coaching summary explaining the focus and goals for this training week.

workouts.description: The list of detailed workout prescriptions for the training week.

weeks.description: The number of weeks in this training phase.

weeklyDistanceStartKm.description: Target weekly distance in kilometers at the start of this phase.

weeklyDistanceEndKm.description: Target weekly distance in kilometers at the end of this phase.

intensityDistribution.description: The intensity distribution for this phase, such as '80/20 easy/hard'.

allowedWorkoutTypes.description: The workout types allowed during this phase.

targetPaceEasySecPerKm.description: Target easy pace in seconds per kilometer for this phase.

targetPaceFastSecPerKm.description: Target fast pace in seconds per kilometer for hard workouts in this phase.

notes.description: Coaching notes explaining the purpose and focus of this phase.

includesDeload.description: Whether this phase includes a deload week for recovery.

preferTrail.description: Whether the runner prefers trail running where possible.

comfortableWithIntensity.description: Whether the runner is comfortable with structured high-intensity workouts (intervals, threshold).

description.description: Runner-supplied free-text description of any other preferences not captured above.
Runner-supplied free-text description that informed the categorical mapping.

occurredOn.description: The calendar date the workout occurred on, as an ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD), resolved against today's date for relative references like "this morning" or "yesterday".

distanceValue.description: The distance the runner stated, as a number in the unit named by distance_unit. Report exactly what the runner said (e.g. 5 for "5 km", 3.1 for "3.1 miles"). Do not convert units yourself.

durationHours.description: The whole hours of the run's elapsed time (0 if under an hour). Report the components the runner stated; do not convert to seconds.

durationMinutes.description: The whole minutes of the run's elapsed time, 0 to 59 (e.g. 25 for "25 minutes", 30 for "1 hour 30 minutes").

durationSeconds.description: The whole seconds of the run's elapsed time, 0 to 59 (e.g. 30 for "22:30"). Use 0 when the runner gave no seconds.

notes.description: Any free-text note the runner included about how it felt or went (e.g. "legs felt heavy"). Null when there is none.

eventName.description: Name of the goal race or event, such as 'Berlin Marathon' or 'Local 10K'.

distanceKm.description: Target distance in kilometers for the event.

eventDateIso.description: Target event date in ISO-8601 calendar form (yyyy-MM-dd).

targetFinishTimeIso.description: Optional target finishing time as ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT1H45M30S). Null if the runner has no specific time goal.

maxRunDaysPerWeek.description: Maximum number of run days per week the runner can commit to. Valid range 1 through 7.

typicalSessionMinutes.description: Typical session duration in minutes the runner has available per training day.

monday.description: Whether Monday is an available run day.

tuesday.description: Whether Tuesday is an available run day.

wednesday.description: Whether Wednesday is an available run day.

thursday.description: Whether Thursday is an available run day.

friday.description: Whether Friday is an available run day.

saturday.description: Whether Saturday is an available run day.

sunday.description: Whether Sunday is an available run day.

description.description: Runner-supplied free-text description of constraints not captured by the day flags (e.g. 'no early mornings').

dayOfWeek.description: The day of the week as an integer: 0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ..., 6 = Saturday.

title.description: A descriptive title for this workout, such as 'Easy Aerobic Run' or 'Threshold Intervals'.

targetDistanceKm.description: Target total distance for this workout in kilometers.

targetDurationMinutes.description: Target total duration for this workout in minutes.

targetPaceEasySecPerKm.description: Target easy pace in seconds per kilometer for easy portions of this workout.

targetPaceFastSecPerKm.description: Target fast pace in seconds per kilometer for hard portions of this workout.

segments.description: The structured segments that make up this workout (warmup, work intervals, cooldown, etc.).

warmupNotes.description: Specific warmup instructions for this workout.

cooldownNotes.description: Specific cooldown instructions for this workout.

coachingNotes.description: Coaching notes explaining the purpose and execution guidance for this workout.

perceivedEffort.description: Expected perceived effort on a 1-10 scale, where 1 is very easy and 10 is maximal.

durationMinutes.description: Duration of this segment in minutes.

targetPaceSecPerKm.description: Target pace in seconds per kilometer for this segment.

repetitions.description: Number of repetitions for interval segments, or 1 for continuous efforts.

notes.description: Coaching notes for this segment, such as effort cues or technique reminders.

bearerAuth.description: JWT bearer token (Authorization: Bearer ...). Either scheme satisfies the CookieOrBearer policy.
